Lathyrus hitchcockianus.notes: Nye Co + Inyo Co CA; Amargosa section Mojave; Grapevine Mts/Bullfrog Hills/Yucca Mtn; enters CA Fall Canyon only ~200m; rocky drainage bottoms/canyon washes; 1067-1951m

Astragalus geyeri var. triquetrus.notes: Clark & Lincoln cos; Colorado River section Mojave; Dry Lake Valley/Valley of Fire/Lake Mead/Moapa Valley/Mormon Mesa; enters AZ Mohave Co ~2km; sand/gravels; 335-854m

Penstemon bicolor.notes: Clark Co; East Mts & Colorado River sections Mojave; Spring Mts/Pahrump east to Desert NWR & Lake Mead; enters CA Castle Mts ~8km; enters AZ ~20km; calcareous/igneous soils; 259-1591m

Ivesia jaegeri.notes: Spring Mts Clark Co (primary) + Clark Mts CA San Bernardino Co ~20km from NV; East Mts section Mojave; shaded crevices/ridges vertical limestone; 1585-3633m

Eriogonum viscidulum.notes: Clark Co; Colorado River section Mojave; Mesquite/Moapa Valley/Mormon Mesa/Gold Butte; enters AZ Mohave Co ~2km; sandy/clay flats/slopes Larrea shrublands; 375-745m

Arctomecon californica.notes: Las Vegas Valley east to Lake Mead NRA; Clark Co; also AZ canyon of Colorado River ~20km; dry shale badlands hummocky high gypsum soil; 323-1110m; pollinator specialist Mojave poppy bee; declining

Grindelia fraxinipratensis.notes: Ash Meadows Nye Co (primary) + immediately adjacent Inyo Co CA; saturated meadows/edges of standing water/moist alkaline swales; 626-701m

Arctomecon merriamii.notes: Clark Co (central) + CA Inyo & San Bernardino cos; broad distribution wide variety soils; 577-1798m

Chloropyron tecopense.notes: Gap Spring Fish Lake Valley Esmeralda Co (higher elevations 1417-1439m) + west of Ash Meadows CA Carson Slough + Tecopa Inyo Co CA (lower 421-764m); moist alkaline seeps/flats

Anelsonia eurycarpa.notes: NW Washoe Co (Little High Rock Reservoir); ~286km NNE from nearest CA occurrence; ~513km SW from Idaho; specialized soils 1600m

Aphyllon pinorum.notes: White Pine Range; White Pine Co; ~496km SE of nearest OR occurrence (Steens Mtn); ~1070km WNW from NM

Astragalus cimae var. cimae.notes: Wassuk Range Mineral Co & south Monitor Range Nye Co; ~205km from nearest CA occurrence Inyo Mts; two NV locations ~180km apart

Astragalus gilmanii.notes: Groom Range; Lincoln Co; ~184km from nearest CA occurrence Panamint Mts Inyo Co

Astragalus inyoensis.notes: Groom Range; Lincoln Co; ~171km from nearest CA occurrence Last Chance Mts Inyo Co

Astragalus megacarpus.notes: Adobe Range/Elko Hills/Cedar Ridge/Pinon Range; SW Elko & adj N Eureka cos; ~225km from nearest UT occurrence Millard Co; low juniper bluffs/knolls

Boechera tiehmii.notes: Mt Rose Carson Range; Washoe Co (type locality); ~154km NNW from nearest CA occurrence Virginia Lakes Basin Mono Co; Sierra Nevada endemic

Cyperus aristulatus.notes: Lower Lehman Creek; White Pine Co; ~420km ESE from nearest CA site Big Pine Inyo Co

Draba brachystylis.notes: Spring Mts; Clark Co; ~492km SW from nearest UT occurrence San Pitch Mts Juab Co; possibly undescribed species

Erigeron multiceps.notes: Bridge Mtn Spring Mts; Clark Co; ~236km E from nearest CA occurrence Kennedy Meadows Sierra Nevada Tulare Co

Eriogonum mensicola.notes: Sheep Range; Clark Co; ~174km E from nearest CA occurrence Panamint Mts Inyo Co

Gentianella tortuosa.notes: Spring Mts (Charleston Mts); Clark Co; ~308km SSW from nearest UT occurrence Markagunt Plateau

Lepidium integrifolium.notes: Railroad Valley; Nye Co; ~213km from nearest UT occurrence Thermo Hot Springs Beaver Co

Limonium californicum.notes: Near Las Vegas; Clark Co; ~374km NE from nearest CA sites Los Angeles area; also Gila Co AZ

Lythrum californicum.notes: Clark/Nye/Humboldt cos; Humboldt Co sites Black Rock Desert ~442km N from nearest CA sites Bishop Inyo Co

Mentzelia mollis.notes: Black Rock Range; Humboldt Co; ~289km SSW from nearest OR occurrence Malheur Co

Musineon divaricatum.physiographic_region: Central Great Basin / Northern Great Basin
Musineon divaricatum.physiographic_section: Central / Bonneville Sections / Owyhee Uplands Section
Musineon divaricatum.notes: White Pine & Eureka cos (long known) + recently Butte & Independence valleys Elko Co; ~386km W from nearest WY occurrence

Oreocarya bakeri.notes: Tippett Canyon Kern Mts; White Pine Co; ~251km SE from nearest UT occurrence SE of Circleville Garfield Co

Parthenium ligulatum.notes: Fish Creek Range; Eureka Co; ~404km just north of west from nearest UT occurrence Teasdale Wayne Co; found 2001

Phacelia inconspicua.notes: Humboldt Range & Eugene Mts; Pershing Co (~30km apart); ~478km NE from nearest ID occurrence Pioneer Mts Butte Co; state protected

Pilostyles thurberi.notes: Nevada National Security Site west side Frenchman Flat; Nye Co; ~370km N from nearest CA occurrence Borrego Valley San Diego Co

Primula incana.notes: North end Butte Valley; Elko Co; ~394km ENE from nearest WY occurrence Uinta Co; ~370km SE from nearest UT occurrence Bryce Canyon Garfield Co

Ribes oxyacanthoides var. hendersonii.notes: Toiyabe Range; Lander & Nye cos; ~546km just west of due south from nearest ID occurrence Pioneer Mts Custer Co

Sphaeromeria argentea.notes: 4 widely scattered locations; Elko/Nye/White Pine cos; ~452km ENE from nearest WY occurrence Fort Bridger Uinta Co

Spiranthes diluvialis.notes: Near Panaca; Lincoln Co; ~207km E to nearest UT occurrence Garfield Co; widely scattered CO/ID/MT/NE/NV/UT/WA/WY

Stipa shoshoneana.notes: Belted Range; Nye Co; ~761km SSW from nearest ID occurrence NE Butte Co ID

Telesonix heucheriformis.notes: Spring Mts; Clark Co; ~729km SSW from nearest UT occurrence Bear River Range Cache Co

Toxicodendron diversilobum.notes: Virginia Mts west side Pyramid Lake; Washoe Co; ~137km E from nearest CA site Dutch Flat area Nevada Co

Woodwardia fimbriata.notes: Spring Mts; Clark Co; ~197km E from nearest CA site Greenhorn Mts Kern Co
